creator: Jille@quis.cx
text:
Taavi Sannik <taavi kood.ee> has created a patch for this. I have just
submitted a PR to update the port (don't know the ID yet; haven't had a
reply from the system).

The original patch is available at
http://source.kood.ee/httpd-2.2.3-peruser-0.3.0-dc3-r57.patch

-- Jille
